query: 我在codex里怎么验证你做的好？

`Stage 11` 的控制面我已经收口了。现在 `.codex/status.md` 和 `.codex/plan.md` 都回到 `Stage 12` 当前，当前切片是 `group-12a-contract-and-replay-hold`；`continue.md`、`progress.md`、`handoff.md`、`codex-resume-pack.md`，以及自动恢复提示也都同步成同一套口径，不再把 `Stage…
现在用户端有明显好用了么？
截至 `2026-04-18`，如果标准是“用户现在能稳定明显感觉更好用了”，我的判断是：`还不能稳妥地这么说`。 更准确地说是两层：
怎么解决，如果这个问题不解决，其他的都不要做
能解，而且方向很明确。关键是别再把它当成“继续做更多功能”，而是把它当成一个单独的 `UX bug` 来收。 我已经先把控制面改了：`.codex/status.md`、`.codex/plan.md` 和几个 host view 现在都回到“只解决用户体感不明显，`Stage 12` 暂停”。
继续做了，且这轮只动了“用户体感”主线。 我已经落了两类实改：
继续做完了两块核心实现，都是围着“用户体感”来的。 这轮代码改动： - `src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js`：默认 recent-message 窗口缩到 `12`，assistant/context 压缩更狠，减少把长历史继续带进当前轮。 - `src/dialogue-working-set-shadow.js` 和…
我在codex里怎么验证你做的好？

decision.archive_summary: Stage 11 control-plane wrap-up was completed earlier; project tracking files were normalized back to Stage 12 with the current slice aligned, so that status can survive as a compact semantic pin instead of raw prompt turns.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn asks how to verify whether the recent Codex-side UX-focused work actually improved things. That is the same active topic as t3-t10, so relation=continue. The validation question still depends on the raw UX-problem thread and the recent implementation claims in t3-t10, which remain unresolved and should stay raw. The initial Stage 11 bookkeeping request/result in t1-t2 is older and not needed as raw evidence for the next turn, but its durable project-status outcome can be preserved as a compact pin.
